response.justification: Well over the required six years of fullstack experience with a stack that closely matches the role: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicit requirement rarely found on resumes. Deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) aligns with the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest not evidenced) rather than fundamental.
strengths: 15+ years spanning frontend, backend, and infrastructure with TypeScript/Node.js/React core stack
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience matching the role's AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries, taught courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Jest experience listed
Kotlin and Python absent; Java exposure appears dated
Significant time in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the role's primary frameworks
